items.name: hitl-utils
items.title: cn utility
items.description: Tailwind classname merge helper used by every HITL Kit primitive.

items.name: hitl-types
items.title: HITL type definitions
items.description: Shared TypeScript types for HITL primitives: AgentStatus, ApprovalStatus, HitlCardState, RightTab.

items.name: hitl-subagent-meta
items.title: Subagent status metadata
items.description: Shared icon and color mapping for the six agent execution states (idle, running, completed, error, skipped, cancelled).

items.name: hitl-card
items.title: Interrupt Card
items.description: In-thread approval boundary for agent actions. Three semantic variants (search, review, write). Four states (idle, expanded, confirmed, dismissed).

items.name: subagent-status-card
items.title: Subagent Status Card
items.description: Single-row agent status with icon, label, detail, and state badge. Use to wrap any in-progress agentic task.

items.name: mini-trace
items.title: MiniTrace
items.description: Collapsible step-by-step renderer for agent reasoning. Thought, action, result. Makes supporting facts visible per §3.3 of the paper.

items.name: ai-generation-scale
items.title: AI Generation Scale
items.description: Five-segment ordinal scale indicating AI involvement in a piece of work. Embodies the scaffolding and expertise-matching principle from Dhillon et al. (2024).

items.name: context-chips
items.title: Context Chips
items.description: Pill chips representing context attached to an agent run. Notes, files, URLs. Removable with overflow truncation.

items.name: qa-flow
items.title: QA Flow
items.description: Multi-question approval card. Single-choice, multi-select, and freeform text. Submits to a confirmed state.

items.name: writing-agent
items.title: Writing Agent
items.description: Compound widget for a draft-in-progress document. Title, target section, word range, evidence notes, and six status states.

items.name: research-agent
items.title: Research Agent
items.description: Three-mode config surface for a long-running research task. Create, follow-up, read URL.

items.name: batch-queue
items.title: Batch Approval Queue
items.description: Sequential approve and reject flow across mixed agent items. Auto-advances and resolves to a summary state.

items.name: search-result-card
items.title: Search Result Card
items.description: Ranked search result card with rank badge, metadata, snippet, and relevance bar.

items.name: approve-reject-row
items.title: Approve / Reject Row
items.description: The canonical binary decision row. Pending, approved, rejected. Optional undo.

items.name: shared-primitives
items.title: Shared Primitives
items.description: The atomic palette. Accent swatches, approval badge variants, and approve and reject rows.

items.name: diff-result
items.title: Diff Result
items.description: Before/after diff card for proposed text or code edits. Per-hunk red/green strips, accept and reject states. The HITL-AI primitive for any in-place edit the human should approve before it lands.

items.name: citation-result
items.title: Citation Result
items.description: Single source-backed citation card. Claim on top, source attribution below, optional supporting quote and confidence badge. Verify or reject.

items.name: editable-plan
items.title: Editable Plan
items.description: Multi-step plan the human can reorder, rename, add to, or delete from before the agent executes. Locked steps cannot be removed.

items.name: tool-call-preview
items.title: Tool Call Preview
items.description: Preview a tool call (name, args, optional rationale and signals) so the human can approve or reject before execution. Pairs with the gates layer for confidence/cost/scope checks.
